title: MediGate Portal
description: Healthcare portal with patient banner and slot grid using data-slot attributes.

task.goal: Book the Tuesday 14:30 video visit slot for the authenticated patient (not in-person or callback options). Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .

standardSteps.note: Many decoy buttons, ads, and domain-specific layout noise
Finds correct primary CTA in page-specific structure

agentdomSteps.note: Structured page landmark with typed actions
Direct WCI node click on annotated overlay

singleShot.goal: Book the Tuesday 14:30 video visit slot for the authenticated patient (not in-person or callback options).

multiStep.title: Constraint-driven Completion
multiStep.goal: Book the Tuesday 14:30 video visit slot for the authenticated patient (not in-person or callback options). Complete with explicit verification and no decoy interactions. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: decoy-nav, decoy-extra

standardFlow.step: Observe page state and locate [target] section
Narrow candidate controls using constraints in goal text
Reject promotional/nav decoys and unrelated duplicate CTAs
Confirm expected transition or state change

wciFlow.step: Read page landmark node and scope context

multiStep.title: Validation + Final Action
multiStep.goal: Book the Tuesday 14:30 video visit slot for the authenticated patient (not in-person or callback options). First validate key constraints (generic confirm on correct slot) then execute and verify. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: decoy-nav, decoy-extra
